name: WebhookEndpoint
description: Represents a consumer-side endpoint that is subscribed to receive webhook event deliveries from a producer or webhook gateway.

id.description: Stable identifier for the webhook endpoint subscription.

url.description: HTTPS URL that the producer will POST event payloads to.

description.description: Human-readable description of the endpoint's purpose.
description.example: Production billing service Stripe webhook handler

enabled_events.description: List of event types this endpoint is subscribed to. Use ['*'] to subscribe to all events.

status.description: Current operational status of the endpoint.

signing.description: Signing configuration the producer uses when delivering to this endpoint.

secret_id.description: Opaque identifier for the signing secret.

header.description: HTTP header name that carries the signature.

retry_policy.description: Retry strategy applied when the consumer responds with a non-2xx status or times out.

rate_limit.description: Optional rate limiting applied by the gateway when delivering to this endpoint.
